# Briefcasse

> Easy and reliable trademark registration and legal services for startups, entrepreneurs, and businesses in India.

## Services

- Trademark Registration: Register and protect your brand name and logo in India
- Startup Registration: Incorporate your company with expert legal support
- Intellectual Property: Copyright, patent, and design registration
- Tax Filing: GST registration and income tax filing for businesses
- MCA Compliance: Annual filings and ROC compliance for companies
- Legal Advisory: Agreement drafting, NDA, founders agreement services

## About

Briefcasse is a legal technology platform that simplifies trademark registration and business compliance for Indian startups and entrepreneurs.

## Contact

- Website: https://briefcasse.com
- Contact page: https://briefcasse.com/contact
